admin.title: AI
admin.description: Configure AI integrations and external access to the MCP server

settings.title: Settings
settings.generalSectionDescription: Control global availability of the AI assistant.
settings.aiEnabledDescription: When disabled, the AI panel and chat API are unavailable to all users.
settings.mcpEnabledDescription: When disabled, the external MCP API endpoint rejects all requests, cutting off Cursor, Claude Desktop and other MCP clients.
settings.chatBehaviorDescription: Control how the AI assistant behaves during conversations.
settings.requireConfirmationDescription: When enabled, the AI will ask for explicit confirmation before executing any delete, remove, stop, or prune operation.
settings.maxStepsDescription: Maximum number of tool calls the AI can chain in a single response. Lower values reduce cost; higher values allow more complex tasks.
settings.mcpPermissionsDescription: Choose which tool groups the AI assistant is allowed to use.
settings.allowExecInContainerDescription: Allow the AI to run arbitrary shell commands inside containers.
settings.allowImagesGroupDescription: Allow the AI to list, pull, tag, delete and prune images.
settings.allowVolumesGroupDescription: Allow the AI to list, create, delete and prune volumes.
settings.allowNetworksGroupDescription: Allow the AI to list, create and delete networks.
settings.allowComposeGroupDescription: Allow the AI to list, deploy and manage Compose stacks.
settings.allowSwarmOperationsDescription: Allow the AI to list and manage Docker Swarm nodes and services.
settings.allowRepositoriesGroupDescription: Allow the AI to list repos, trigger builds, manage env variables and delete repositories.
settings.allowRegistriesGroupDescription: Allow the AI to list, create, update and delete container registries.
settings.allowSslGroupDescription: Allow the AI to list, issue and delete SSL certificates.
settings.allowEnvironmentsGroupDescription: Allow the AI to list, create, update and delete Docker environments.
settings.customPromptDescription: Append additional instructions to the base system prompt. Useful for org-specific rules or constraints.
settings.customPromptPlaceholder: e.g. Always tag images with the prefix prod- before pushing…

models.title: Models
models.deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete the {provider} API key? This action cannot be undone.

mcp.title: MCP Server
mcp.description: The Model Context Protocol server lets external tools (Cursor, Claude Desktop, etc.) interact with your Nexploy infrastructure.
mcp.endpointDescription: Use this URL in your MCP client configuration.
mcp.generatedWarning: Copy this key now — it will not be shown again.
mcp.noKeys: No API keys yet. Generate one to connect an external MCP client.
mcp.confirmRevoke: Are you sure you want to revoke this API key? External tools using it will lose access.

chat.keyboardHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line

containers.showLogs: Show the logs of a container
containers.execCommand: Run a command inside a running container

images.listWithSizes: List all images and how much space they use
images.pullImage: Pull an image from a registry
images.pruneDangling: Delete all unused images to free disk space

volumes.pruneUnused: Delete all volumes not used by any container

networks.listNetworks: List all networks and their drivers
networks.inspectNetwork: Inspect a network and its connected containers

compose.listContainers: List containers belonging to a stack
compose.teardownStack: Stop and remove a compose stack

repositories.listWithStatus: List all repositories and their last build status
repositories.showFailing: Which repositories have a failing build?
repositories.triggerBuild: Trigger a build for a repository
repositories.showEnvVars: List environment variables for a repository

repository.triggerBuild: Trigger a new build for this repository
repository.showBuildLogs: Show the logs of the last build
repository.setEnvVar: Add or update an environment variable

build.showNodeLogs: Show the logs of a specific pipeline step
build.listBuilds: List all builds for this repository

ssl.listCertificates: List all SSL certificates and their expiry dates
ssl.issueLetsEncrypt: Issue a Let's Encrypt certificate for a domain

swarm.listNodes: List all swarm nodes and their status
swarm.listServices: List all swarm services and their replica count
swarm.scaleService: Change the number of replicas for a service
